title: Dance A Baby
content:
Dance a baby diddy!
    What can mammy do wid'e?
    Sit in her lap,
    Give it some pap,
    And dance a baby diddy!
meaning:
Walter Crane's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Dance A Baby"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
